# cortexcloud_compliance_assessment_profiles (Data Source)

Provides a filtered list of Compliance Assessment Profiles.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cortexcloud_compliance_assessment_profiles" "all" {
  search_from = 0
  search_to   = 100
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block, Optional) Filter criteria for the assessment profiles. 

Note: for the 'is_custom' field, use operator 'in' (the API does not support 'eq'; if 'eq' is specified it will be automatically converted to 'in'). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `search_from` (Number) The starting index for pagination.
- `search_to` (Number) The ending index for pagination.

### Read-Only

- `assessment_profiles` (Attributes List) The list of compliance assessment profiles. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--assessment_profiles))
- `id` (String) Static identifier for the data source.

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Optional:

- `field` (String) The field to filter on.
- `operator` (String) The filter operator to use (e.g., 'in', 'contains').
- `value` (String) The value to filter by.


<a id="nestedatt--assessment_profiles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `assessment_profiles`

Read-Only:

- `asset_group_id` (Number) The ID of the asset group to assess.
- `asset_group_name` (String) The name of the asset group.
- `created_by` (String) The user who created the assessment profile.
- `description` (String) The description of the assessment profile.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the assessment profile is enabled.
- `id` (String) The ID of the assessment profile.
- `insert_ts` (Number) The insertion timestamp.
- `modified_by` (String) The user who last modified the assessment profile.
- `modify_ts` (Number) The modification timestamp.
- `name` (String) The name of the assessment profile.
- `report_frequency` (String) The frequency for generating reports (cron format).
- `report_targets` (List of String) The list of email addresses to send reports to.
- `report_type` (String) The type of report to generate (e.g., 'PDF', 'CSV', 'NONE').
- `standard_id` (String) The ID of the compliance standard to assess against.
- `standard_name` (String) The name of the compliance standard.
